infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Sentinel AI needs motion sensor access to detect accidents in real time.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Sentinel AI uses your location to record crash coordinates and calculate speed.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Sentinel AI monitors your location in the background to detect accidents even when the app is minimized.
